known_gaps: Retention window ~2 years; older filings need manual backfill.
Corrigenda can overwrite originals; documents are archived on capture to mitigate.
Good for large awards; smaller state tenders and corrigenda coverage incomplete.
Submitted via the report form; surfaced as user-reported in the source trail when resolved.
Several BEST tenders run via Mahatenders / CESL lots. Not yet indexed.
Karnataka e-proc carries bid submission. Not yet indexed.
Broad discovery, weak on corrigenda/awards which live on issuer portals. Not yet indexed.

DTC publishes tender notices publicly on dtc.delhi.gov.in/tenders (notice board, no login) and on the Delhi NIC eProcurement portal govtprocurement.delhi.gov.in (public Latest Tenders/Corrigendum listing, ~10-item rolling windows). Bid submission is DSC-gated but discovery is open and no captcha is evident, so it does NOT defer like GeM/state-eproc. Recon done 2026-06-26; no scraper built and no rows ingested yet; comprehensive historical discovery not yet validated. Corrigenda are NOT captured: the Latest-Corrigendums feed identifies tenders by issuer NIT ref, a different namespace from the Latest-Tenders feed's GePNIC system codes, so corrigenda cannot be linked to their parent tender by ref; deferred until a linkage mechanism (e.g. PDF-level parent-id extraction) exists.
DEFERRED. Login-gated, bot-defended. Explicitly a known coverage gap for now.
High-credibility sanction/deployment figures. Keyword-triggered; pre-2022 not indexed.
DEFERRED. DSC-gated bid systems (Mahatenders, Delhi/Karnataka/AP/TS e-proc). Known gap.
Scraper in progress. State data revises ~3 months; trailing months re-captured.
